message:
fix: prevent division by zero and improve code quality

Safety Service (safety.service.ts):
- Guard against division by zero in checkBudget when totalDollars is 0
- Guard against division by zero in recordUsage when totalDollars is 0
- Skip threshold alerts when budget limit is not configured

WebSocket Hub (hub.ts):
- Make getStats() a pure read operation with no side effects
- Add separate resetMessageStats() method for resetting counters
- Prevents inconsistent behavior when getStats() is called multiple times

Handoff Service (handoff.service.ts):
- Add retention period for completed handoffs (1 hour)
- Fix map modification during iteration by collecting IDs first
- Improve cleanup logic for terminal handoffs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
